item.title: F-025a: AI Improve Writing
item.intent: Select text, tap Improve, get a better version. This is the primary AI interaction and the one we demo to sell the product.
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-041 (AI Model Pipeline), FEAT-054 (AI Action Bar). Select text, see Improve in floating action bar, tap it. AI produces improved version with grammar, clarity, and conciseness fixes. Shows inline diff preview: original with strikethrough, suggestion in green. User taps Accept (text replaced, haptic), edits suggestion, or dismisses. Undoable with Cmd+Z. Streams progressively. First token <500ms, full response <3s. Works offline. AI is content-aware: understands whether selection is prose, a diagram block, or a table, and adapts its suggestions accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: User selects a paragraph, taps Improve, sees inline diff within 3 seconds, accepts with one tap
AI works in airplane mode with no network connection
AI works on iPhone 15 and does not appear on iPhone 14
All AI actions are undoable with Cmd+Z
Inline diff preview shows original and suggestion clearly distinguishable
Accept replaces text and triggers haptic confirmation
Dismissing returns to original text with no modifications
AI output streams token-by-token into the diff preview
